allow: Bash(node -e "const {PNG} = require\(''pngjs''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); const data = fs.readFileSync\(''public/assets/office/tilesets/Office Tileset All 32x32 no shadow.png''\); const png = PNG.sync.read\(data\); console.log\(''Tileset:'', png.width, ''x'', png.height\); const room = PNG.sync.read\(fs.readFileSync\(''public/assets/office/rooms/Office Level 2.png''\)\); console.log\(''Room:'', room.width, ''x'', room.height\);")
